title: Fix incorrect monthly totals in the expense ledger
description: The csv-ledger expense tracker produces wrong monthly net totals when credit transactions are present. The existing test in src/report.rs fails: the reported January net total does not match the expected value. Investigate the full pipeline — parse_csv in src/parser.rs feeds build_ledger in src/ledger.rs which feeds monthly_totals in src/report.rs — and fix the defect so that monthly totals correctly reflect credits received and debits paid out.
acceptance_criteria: Monthly totals for credit transactions carry the correct positive sign (money received increases the net balance).
Monthly totals for debit transactions carry the correct negative sign (money paid out decreases the net balance).
The existing test monthly_net_totals_are_correct in src/report.rs passes.
The gate command `cargo test` exits zero with no test failures.

files_to_modify.change: Review the sign applied to each transaction kind and ensure credits and debits are stored with the correct sign per the doc-comment convention.
The failing test lives here; confirm the monthly accumulation logic is correct or adjust it if the investigation reveals a defect.
